I'm going to try and get them done by Tuesday, but can we see them Wednesday just in case?
Yeah, yeah, for sure.
I was going to say, we can have our, like, I will get the bid by tomorrow, but just in case something goes terribly wrong.
It took me a little while of like beating my head against the old to understand what was happening.
So I definitely understand wanting a buffer.
I'm like, I reviewed the whole process, but I still have not done it.
Perfect.
And then I'll share with them that starting next week, we'll do new articles Tuesday.
Okay.
Jason's.
It's Wednesday.
Sounds good.
And that it just gives them more time to review stuff.
Cool.
Anything else?
Any other questions that you had for me?
No, I think that's it.
Like keep me posted about some of these like influx deliverables, but I feel like I have a better understanding than I did when I logged on today.
So at least I could get started on today.
Yeah.
Yeah.
No, happy to, happy to help.
I feel like we're all in that post new year's limbo of like, what's life?
What's happening?
What are things?
And Friday trying to like reduce that a little bit, which did help, but I still am like, I still getting acquainted with everything again today.
No, feel that.
I, um, I knocked a few things out Friday and I still, I like went into the weekend feeling like I still have a bajillion things that I need to, all the things that I wanted to do my quiet week.
But I like, I'm going to get so much done.
And I'm like, well, I got a little done.
Yeah, exactly.
Cool.
Yeah, I will keep you posted on follow-up stuff.
If there's anything else that you need from me, feel free to flag.
I canceled our pod meeting tomorrow morning just so that we all have a little bit more time.
And since we're all meeting this morning, like I don't really have any major updates.
But if you need another meeting one-on-one, I can hop in.
My Thursdays are nuts.
They're like all client meetings.
But Wednesday or Friday, I've got pretty free.
Okay, good to know.
Good to know.
Yeah.
Awesome.
Well, thanks for hopping on.
First thing Monday.
We're wrapping your brain around everything.
Glad we had it so that we can get started.
But I'll holler if anything else comes up.
Perfect.
Sounds good.
All right.
Have a good one.
You too.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on client priorities and deliverables for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Monograph:** The new Leads launch is postponed to late Jan, so the content mix remains balanced (CRM, AI, Eng). Felix will conduct keyword research for the launch by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [**Biologica:** The account is at risk of pausing due to renewal talks. Felix will prioritize clearing the link-checking backlog and revert to the 5-article/week contract rate to rebuild the content buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [**Metronome:** A new delivery cadence starts next week (Tues: new articles, Thurs: finalized JSONs). This week, Felix will analyze client edits in Claude to find patterns for pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** To combat topic redundancy, Katya will create a content calendar and Felix will review assignments for duplicate pricing structures.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Topics

### Monograph

  - [**Launch Postponed:** The "Leads" launch is now targeting late January.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [**Content Mix:** Maintain a balanced content mix (CRM, AI, Eng) this week, not just Leads content.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Engineering:** Focus on non-civil engineering, using successful civil eng pieces as a model.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:** Felix will conduct keyword research for the Leads launch by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Resources:** Yana's initial keyword list (\~15-20 approved terms) is available.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [**Process:** Use the new agentic pipeline (title, keywords, persona); the old Atlas assignment generator is deprecated.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Airtable Upload:** Katya will assist with the Airtable upload process, which can be "funky."](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Biologica

  - [**Renewal Risk:** The account may pause due to renewal talks over pricing and the client's editorial involvement.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [**Immediate Focus:** Prioritize clearing the link-checking backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Content Buffer:** The 2-week content buffer is depleted.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Action:** Revert to the 5-article/week contract rate (down from 6) to rebuild the buffer.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Decision:** Katya will confirm the new article vs. link-checking mix with the client today.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Pipeline Improvement:** A "regulatory check" feature is a client priority. The engineering ticket is filed; Felix will monitor progress.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Metronome

  - [**Problem:** Client edits are extensive and inconsistent, making pipeline improvements difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** The pipeline is not built to enforce the strict structure required for JSON conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [**Example:** Adding new sub-headers breaks the JSON template.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [**Felix:** Analyze all recent client edits in Claude to find patterns for pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
      - [**Katya:** Create a content calendar and review assignments for duplicate pricing structures.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [**New Delivery Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
      - [**This Week:** Finalized JSONs by Wednesday; new articles by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
      - [**Starting Next Week:** New articles on Tuesdays; finalized JSONs on Thursdays.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Felix:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Conduct Monograph keyword research by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Begin Biologica link-checking backlog today.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
      - [Analyze Metronome edits in Claude to find patterns for pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Confirm Biologica's content mix (new articles vs. link-checking) with the client today.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Create the Metronome content calendar today.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Inform Metronome of the new delivery cadence (Tues/Thurs) starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/2Ujsk7vw2oXx9Yu2QFAwovmq_LNRVWyT?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)

action_items.description: Share Fathom, Allison’s priorities, Nov performance report w/ Felix
Do Monograph keyword research; share w/ Katya for Wed client mtg
Email Brian (Biologica): confirm backlog vs new; propose 2 new + 10 link checks
Start Biologica link checking; update approved links
Generate 1 postmenopause + 1 reproductive-years article for Biologica buffer
Review Monograph 'Considering' for overlaps/cannibalization; flag to Katya
Build Monograph content calendar from high/medium; share w/ Felix + client
Review next 2 weeks of Monograph assignments for duplicate pricing; split as needed
Download Metronome docs; run Claude analysis; finalize JSONs; file eng ticket re: JSON pipeline
Email Metronome: this week JSONs by Wed, new articles by Thu; next week Tue/Thu cadence
